exports.content: CF3-PA passivated Pb-Sn perovskite films exhibit effective carrier lifetime of 966 ns, compared to 437 ns (PA), 365 ns (PEA), and 159 ns (control), as measured by time-resolved photoluminescence
exports.label: carrier_lifetime_966_ns

exports.content: Among three passivators tested (PEA, PA, CF3-PA), CF3-PA produces the best Pb-Sn PSC performance across all PV parameters (Voc, Jsc, FF, PCE) with 1.2 um thick absorber layers
exports.label: cf3_pa_best_passivator

exports.content: 4-trifluoromethyl-phenylammonium (CF3-PA) is an ammonium cation passivator where the highly electronegative fluorine atoms withdraw electron density from the aromatic ring, leaving higher electropositivity at the NH3+ side and enhancing binding with negatively charged defect sites on Pb-Sn perovskite surfaces
exports.label: cf3_pa_passivator

exports.content: Ab initio molecular dynamics at 400 K show all 16 CF3-PA cations adsorb completely on the perovskite surface, compared to 15/16 for PA and 13/16 for PEA, indicating near-complete defect coverage during film formation
exports.label: complete_surface_coverage

exports.content: CF3-PA passivation increases the carrier diffusion length in Pb-Sn perovskite films threefold from 1.8 um to 5.4 um, enabling 1.2 um thick absorber layers for high photocurrent density
exports.label: diffusion_length_5_um

exports.content: Monolithic all-perovskite tandem solar cells combining a wide-bandgap (~1.8 eV) mixed Br/I perovskite front cell with a narrow-bandgap (~1.2 eV) mixed Pb-Sn perovskite back cell, using CF3-PA (4-trifluoromethyl-phenylammonium) additive in the Pb-Sn precursor solution at 0.3 mol%
exports.label: exp_context

exports.content: Large-area tandem device (aperture area 1.05 cm2) achieves PCE of 25.3% with Voc=2.03 V, Jsc=16 mA/cm2, FF=78%, demonstrating scalability
exports.label: large_area_25_3_pct

exports.content: XRD patterns show that adding trace amounts of CF3-PA does not form 2D perovskite phases even at 20 mol% concentration, maintaining pure 3D perovskite structure beneficial for charge transport through thick absorber layers
exports.label: no_2d_phase_formation

exports.content: CF3-PA passivated single-junction Pb-Sn PSCs with 1.2 um absorber achieve best PCE of 22.2% (stabilized 22.0%), with Voc=0.841 V, Jsc=33.0 mA/cm2, FF=80%, and average PCE of 20.8+/-0.5% across 237 devices
exports.label: pb_sn_psc_22_pct

exports.content: Angle-dependent XPS measurements confirm that CF3-PA passivation successfully suppresses surface Sn2+ oxidation in Pb-Sn perovskite films by passivating undercoordinated Sn atoms and Sn vacancies
exports.label: sn_oxidation_suppressed

exports.content: DFT calculations show CF3-PA has the strongest binding energy with acceptor-type defects (FA vacancy, Sn vacancy, I_Sn, I_Pb antisites) on Pb-Sn perovskite surfaces among all three passivators, and eliminates deep in-gap states from antisite defects
exports.label: strongest_binding_energy

exports.content: CF3-PA not only increases adsorption probability on perovskite surfaces but also suppresses iodide ion desorption at 400 K, reducing formation of both iodine vacancies and iodine interstitial defects
exports.label: suppressed_iodine_vacancies

exports.content: All-perovskite tandem solar cells achieve certified stabilized PCE of 26.4% (JET calibration), exceeding the best single-junction perovskite solar cell efficiency and comparable to the best single-crystalline silicon cells
exports.label: tandem_26_4_certified

exports.content: The best tandem cell achieves PCE of 26.7% from reverse scan with Voc=2.03 V, Jsc=16.5 mA/cm2, and FF=79.9%, with stabilized PCE of 26.6%
exports.label: tandem_26_7_best

exports.content: Can all-perovskite tandem solar cells achieve operational stability beyond 1000 hours under continuous illumination, and how does CF3-PA passivation affect long-term ion migration in the Pb-Sn subcell?
exports.label: tandem_long_term

exports.content: Encapsulated CF3-PA tandem devices retain 90% of initial PCE after 600 h of continuous MPP tracking under 1-sun illumination in ambient air (30-50% humidity) at approximately 35C device temperature
exports.label: tandem_stability_90_pct_600h

exports.content: Increasing Pb-Sn absorber thickness from 750 to 1200 nm with CF3-PA increases tandem Jsc from 15.4 to 16.5 mA/cm2 due to enhanced near-infrared light absorption in the back subcell
exports.label: thick_absorber_enables_high_jsc
